sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95174" key="sko/rpisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκόρπ-ισις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n95174.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reduction to powder</tr_>, Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0008.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.178B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.178B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
